$schema_note: Per-template manifest. The dashboard scans dashboard/templates/<NAME>/manifest.json and aggregates all entries it finds. Add a new template by dropping a .indd into the repo-root templates/ directory and creating a sibling folder here with this shape.
label: Recently Leased IOS
static_frames_note: Other named frames in this template (agent names patrick_sior/max_sior, contacts jack_contact/patrick_contact/max_contact, logo, company_info, declaration, decorative *_frame, tile_N tile-background frames) are static and not surfaced in the dashboard. The user manages them in InDesign directly.
